title: lasiocladus anthospermifolius
intro: Lasiocladus anthospermifolius, also known as the "Hawaiian Hair Fern", is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lasiocladus anthospermifolius include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
